title: IREN Ltd (IREN) Soars 10.13% as Nvidia Ramps up AI Investments
description: IREN Ltd. (NASDAQ:IREN) is one of the 10 Stocks Making Huge Moves Today. IREN climbed by 10.13 percent on Wednesday to finish at $41.98 apiece, as investor optimism was fueled by Nvidia Corp.’s ramped up investments in data center companies, strengthening its confidence for the artificial intelligence sector. In an announcement on the same day, [...]

title: Zoom Expands Enterprise Agentic AI Platform To Orchestrate Workflows Across Collaboration And Customer Experience
description: (MENAFN - Mid-East Info) New innovations include expanding AI Companion 3.0 more broadly across the Zoom platform and introducing custom AI agents to orchestrate workflows in Zoom and third-party ...

title: AI founders must move fast to stay on top of tech stacks: Resolve AI CEO Spiros Xanthos
description: With artificial intelligence maturing rapidly and demand from customers increasing significantly, AI startups need to move fast and stay on top of every layer of the technology stack from hardware to user experience, said Spiros Xanthos, founder and chief executive of Resolve AI, an agentic AI platform for software troubleshooting.

title: Australians taking longer to buy cars as AI becomes major influence
description: The findings come from Australia’s Car Buyer Report 2026. The post Australians taking longer to buy cars as AI becomes major influence appeared first on Mediaweek .
